name: MIDI Player
description: This algorithm plays standard MIDI files, outputting the MIDI messages, and converting the MIDI to CVs and gates. It will use an internal clock (using the file's tempo, if specified), or sync to analogue clocks or incoming MIDI clock. See the MicroSD card section above for information on supported MIDI file formats, and how to arrange the files on the card. Optionally, this algorithm will also process live MIDI. While the MIDI/CV converters built into this algorithm are convenient for simple monophonic use, you may like to pair this algorithm with Poly CV (below) for more flexibility.
short_description: Plays MIDI files from the MicroSD card
gui_description: On the right side, the display shows the current transport position (in bars, beats, and sixteenths) and the current position within the file (which would be different if, say, the file had looped, or you select a new file to play without stopping the transport). Below that is the file’s tempo (if it defines one) and the file’s length in bars. At the bottom right is a simple progress bar, indicating the playback position within the file. There are two lines of activity indicators. The upper one represents the tracks in the file; the lower one represents MIDI channels. If the current parameter is one of the ‘Track mode’ parameters, further information about that track is shown: the track name (if defined in the file) and the most recent MIDI message played on that track.

parameters.name: Folder
parameters.description: Chooses the folder of MIDI files on the card.

parameters.name: File
parameters.description: Chooses the MIDI file within the folder.

parameters.name: Play
parameters.description: Starts/stops playback using the internal timebase.

parameters.name: Start from bar
parameters.description: Sets the bar number within the file from which to start playback.

parameters.name: File change
parameters.description: Sets the behaviour when a new file is chosen.
enum_values: Wait until the end of the bar and then change to the new file.
Wait until the end of the file and then change to the new file.

parameters.name: File restart
parameters.description: Sets how the file position changes when switching to a new file.
enum_values: The new file starts from the beginning.
The new file starts from the current position in the old file (modulo the length of the new file).

parameters.name: Track mode 1-24
parameters.description: Set the playback mode for the tracks.

parameters.name: 1-4 MIDI channel
parameters.description: MIDI channel for the MIDI/CV converter.

parameters.name: Drum first note
parameters.description: The first (lowest) note for the drum converter.

parameters.name: Drum channel
parameters.description: MIDI channel for the drum converter.

parameters.name: Trigger length
parameters.description: Sets the length of output trigger pulses.

parameters.name: Convert live MIDI
parameters.description: If enabled, MIDI sent to the algorithm is converted by its MIDI/CV converters as if it originated in the MIDI file.

parameters.name: Clock multiplier
parameters.description: Sets the multiplier for incoming clock pulses.

parameters.name: Reset mode
parameters.description: Sets the mode for the reset input.
enum_values: the input is a reset trigger.
the input is a run/stop signal.

parameters.name: Follow MIDI clock
parameters.description: Sets whether the algorithm follows incoming MIDI clock.

parameters.name: Output MIDI clock
parameters.description: Set whether the algorithm outputs MIDI clock.

parameters.name: Output to breakout
parameters.description: Enables MIDI output to the breakout.

parameters.name: Output to Select Bus
parameters.description: Enables MIDI output to the Select Bus.

parameters.name: Output to USB
parameters.description: Enables MIDI output to USB.

parameters.name: Output to internal
parameters.description: Enables internal MIDI output – that is, MIDI is sent to the other algorithms.

input_ports.name: MIDI Input
input_ports.description: Incoming MIDI data for playback or live processing.

input_ports.name: Clock Input
input_ports.description: Analogue or MIDI clock signal for synchronization.

input_ports.name: Reset Input
input_ports.description: Input signal for resetting playback position.

input_ports.name: Clock input
input_ports.description: The bus to use as the clock input.

input_ports.name: Reset input
input_ports.description: The bus to use as the reset input.

output_ports.name: MIDI Breakout
output_ports.description: MIDI output to the breakout connector.

output_ports.name: MIDI Select Bus
output_ports.description: MIDI output to the Select Bus.

output_ports.name: Internal MIDI
output_ports.description: MIDI output sent to other algorithms.

output_ports.name: Pitch Output 1-4
output_ports.description: CV pitch output from the MIDI/CV converter.

output_ports.name: Gate Output 1-4
output_ports.description: CV gate output from the MIDI/CV converter.

output_ports.name: 1-4 Pitch output
output_ports.description: Bus for the MIDI/CV converter pitch output.

output_ports.name: 1-4 Gate output
output_ports.description: Bus for the MIDI/CV converter gate output.
